title: Intensely Sweet Argentinian Rhubarb Empanadas
description: Fresh and snappy Argentinian empanadas featuring forced rhubarb with an al dente finish, perfect for a kosher friendly dessert
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a bowl whisk together flour and salt
Add cold butter and use a pastry blender to work it into the flour
Gradually add cold water to form a dough
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass
Place a spoonful of rhubarb in the center of each dough circle
Fold the dough in half and press the edges together to seal the empanada
Brush the tops of the empanadas with beaten egg for a golden glaze
Bake the empanadas for 25 minutes or until golden brown
Allow the empanadas to cool before dusting with confectioners sugar and lemon zest
